title: allium carinatum var. calabrum
intro: Allium carinatum var. calabrum, also known as keeled flowering onion, is a variety of the Keel-headed Garlic plant (Allium carinatum) that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Allium carinatum var. calabrum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving immune function, and potentially lowering the risk of certain diseases, such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
